abilities.name: Foresight
abilities.text: Look at the top 2 cards of your deck; you may reorder them.

abilities.name: Perfect Timing
abilities.text: Search your deck for any card, reveal it, and put it on top of your deck.

abilities.name: Nudge
abilities.text: Move a target creature to an adjacent empty slot.

abilities.name: Rebalance
abilities.text: Swap the Attack and Health of your leftmost and rightmost creatures.

abilities.name: Sudden Betrayal
abilities.text: Target creature deals its Attack to the creatures adjacent to it.

abilities.name: Wither
abilities.text: Deal 1 damage to a target creature.

abilities.name: Grave Call
abilities.text: Return the top creature of your graveyard to your hand.

abilities.name: Last Stitch
abilities.text: Destroy a target creature and all copies of it everywhere (hand, deck, board).

abilities.name: Kindle
abilities.text: Summon a 1/1 Flame Bud token in an empty slot.

abilities.name: Heat Wave
abilities.text: Apply Burn 1 to all enemy creatures.

abilities.name: Conflagration
abilities.text: Double all current Burn values, then trigger all Burn damage immediately.

abilities.name: Weather Eye
abilities.text: Look at the top card of your deck; you may put it on the bottom.
